# CWE-306 — Missing Authentication for Critical Function (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-306-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Safe: requires authenticated operator before truncating ledger.
func PurgeLedger(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	if c.GetString("operator_id") == "" {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "auth required"})
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("TRUNCATE ledger")
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"purged": true})
}
